comment: Synthetic TNBC HER2-low metastatic, female 52 postmenopausal, prior pembrolizumab + chemo (KEYNOTE-522; PD-L1 CPS ≥10). HER2 IHC 1+ (HER2-low — present in ~35-40% of TNBC). No germline BRCA alteration. Engine: ALGO-BREAST-TNBC-2L step 1 BRCA-neg → step 2 RF-BREAST-HER2-LOW-ACTIONABLE fires → step 3 → IND-BREAST-TNBC-2L-T-DXD-HER2-LOW. DESTINY-Breast04 TNBC HER2-low subset: mPFS 6.9 vs 5.6 mo (subgroup; smaller n); T-DXd preferred over sacituzumab when HER2-low present.

prior_lines: pembrolizumab + carboplatin + paclitaxel (KEYNOTE-522 backbone) — PD at 12 mo
